title: pelargonium nervifolium
intro: Pelargonium nervifolium, also known as Mountain Rose or Cape Geranium, is a perennial plant species native to the Western Cape region of South Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various gastrointestinal issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium nervifolium include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
